heroDescription: Explore ByteDance Seedream image generation models on Novita AI for text-to-image, image-to-image, and high-quality visual creation workflows.
seoDescription: Explore Seedream AI models on Novita AI. Compare Seedream 5.0 Lite and Seedream 4.5 image generation model pages for API integration.
overviewBody: Seedream is ByteDance Seed's image generation model family. Public Seedream releases cover bilingual text-to-image generation, unified image generation and editing, multi-image composition, and high-resolution creative output.

On Novita AI, this collection groups enabled Seedream model pages so developers can compare text-to-image and image-to-image capable entries, then open a dedicated page for API behavior, pricing, and Playground testing.

lineupSections.title: Seedream 5.0 Lite
lineupSections.description: Seedream 5.0 Lite is a newer lightweight Seedream release for efficient image generation workflows.
items: Use it for newer Seedream image generation workflows where a lightweight latest-generation model is preferred.
Official material emphasizes improved prompt following and alignment; exact Novita parameter support should be confirmed on the model page.

lineupSections.title: Seedream 4.x
lineupSections.description: Seedream 4.x models are used for text-to-image and image-to-image visual creation workflows.
items: Use Seedream 4.5 for enabled Novita image generation and editing workflows.
Public official documentation is stronger for Seedream 4.0 than 4.5-specific behavior, so confirm model-page parameters before integration.

faq.question: What is Seedream used for?
faq.answer: Seedream is used for AI image generation. Depending on the version, public material describes text-to-image generation, image editing, multi-image composition, and bilingual prompt handling.

faq.question: Which Seedream models are enabled on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The current Seedream collection includes Seedream 5.0 Lite and Seedream 4.5 from Novita enabled multimodal configuration.

models.name: seedream-5.0-lite
models.description: Generate and edit images with ByteDance Seedream 5.0 Lite for efficient visual creation workflows.

models.name: seedream-4.5
models.description: Create and edit images with Seedream 4.5 for text-to-image and image-to-image workflows.
